repo.description: Python package for rendering 3D scenes and animations using blender.

terms.context_snippet: A go-to library for rendering 3D scenes and animations. Whether you're looking for a simple rendering script for making demos or producing multi-view image dataset for training, bpy-renderer is a modular toolbox that supports both.
